question: What is the order of the three trips I took in the past three months, from earliest to latest?
ground_truth_answer: I went on a day hike to Muir Woods National Monument with my family, then I went on a road trip with friends to Big Sur and Monterey, and finally I started my solo camping trip to Yosemite National Park.
